methods.description: This method describes the modeling of the ocean component using a shallow-water layer with an embedded mixed layer. It involves the use of a reduced-gravity model to simulate the flow evolution and thermocline displacement, which is crucial for understanding ocean dynamics in climate models.

steps.description: The ocean component of the model consists of a shallow-water layer of mean depth H with an embedded mixed layer of fixed depth H1.
steps.searchable_summary: Define ocean model with shallow-water and mixed layers

steps.description: The flow evolution in the shallow-water layer with velocity field (u,v,w) and thermocline displacement h is described by a reduced-gravity model.
steps.searchable_summary: Implement reduced-gravity model for flow evolution

steps.description: The equations for the surface (Ekman) layer velocities (us, vs) are defined.
steps.searchable_summary: Define equations for Ekman layer velocities

steps.description: The zonal wind stress τx is decomposed into an external and a coupled contribution.
steps.searchable_summary: Decompose zonal wind stress into components

steps.description: The evolution of the sea surface temperature T is described by a linear damping coefficient aT.
steps.searchable_summary: Model sea surface temperature evolution with damping

methods.description: This method involves coupling the ocean model to a Gill atmosphere model, which is driven by heat fluxes from the ocean. The atmosphere model is essential for simulating atmospheric dynamics and interactions with the ocean.

steps.description: The ocean model is coupled to a Gill atmosphere model with zonal and meridional velocities (ua, va), geopotential height φ, and a linear damping coefficient A.
steps.searchable_summary: Couple ocean model to Gill atmosphere model

steps.description: The atmosphere is driven by heat fluxes from the ocean that depend linearly on the anomalies of sea surface temperature T with respect to the radiation equilibrium temperature T0.
steps.searchable_summary: Drive atmosphere model with ocean heat fluxes
